chat.title: ConstructAI Assistant
chat.status: Online — trained on technical data sheets
chat.placeholder: Describe your project or ask about materials...
chat.welcome:
Hello! I am **ConstructAI**, trained on technical data sheets from the main construction materials. 🏗️

I can help you with:
- **Quantity estimates** for any construction project
- **Technical specs** — dosage, strength, consumption rates
- **Recommendations** for different work types
- **Product comparisons**

Describe the project you want to complete!
chat.newChat: New conversation! How can I help? 🏗️
chat.errorConnect: ⚠️ Connection error. Check your API key and try again.
chat.errorRateLimit: ⚠️ Too many questions in a short time. My creator pays for these answers. Until I don't make some money this feature will be limited.
suggestions: 🏗️ Which materials do you know about?
🧱 How many bricks for a 20m² wall?

materials.askFull: I want complete technical information about {name}, including consumption, dosage and application recommendations.
